Author: XeldarAlz
Name: LastHit
Punchline: Auto-fires your PvP Limit Break when an enemy is about to die.
Description: PvP-only plugin. Watches enemy HP in PvP and fires your job's PvP Limit Break when HP drops below a configurable, per-job threshold. Optionally auto-selects the lowest-HP hostile in range. Use /lasthit to open.
